components_project_InviteParticipantDial.k9: After joining the worksite, this company will be able to sponsor it and unlock premium features for all participants.

components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k44:
Hello,

The worksite is now sponsored by {{value1}}. Advanced worksite features are now available to participants.

Best regards,
The EdilSync team
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k45: The worksite now unlocks premium features for all participants.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k46: The sponsorship from {{value1}} has ended and some advanced worksite features are no longer available.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k47:
Hello,

The sponsorship from {{value1}} has ended. Some advanced worksite features may no longer be available until a new sponsorship is activated.

Best regards,
The EdilSync team
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k48: The worksite returns to the Base plan until it is sponsored again.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k49: This worksite needs a sponsor company to be fully active again.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k50: You can invite a company and restore sponsorship.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k51: To unlock milestones, advanced documents, advanced chat, and finance, a participating Pro company must sponsor the worksite.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k52: You can activate the worksite Pro plan now with one of your participating Pro companies.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k53: You are an admin of a participating company. Upgrading to Pro will let you activate this worksite Pro plan.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k54: Sponsorship activates the Pro plan only inside this worksite.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k55: When a Pro company sponsors the worksite, all participants can use its advanced features.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k56: If sponsorship ends, data stays saved but advanced features pause until a new sponsor arrives.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k57: Choose the Pro company that should activate this worksite Pro plan.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k58: Sponsorship starts immediately and stays active while the sponsor company keeps its Pro plan and remains in the worksite.
components_project_ProjectSponsorshipCar.k59: The worksite will immediately lose premium features. If the owner already has another unsponsored worksite, the worksite will enter the blocked state until a new sponsorship arrives.

pages_CompanyDetail.k2: Activate advanced tools and worksite sponsorship for your company.
pages_CompanyDetail.k3: Open billing and discover the yearly plan with 2 free months.
pages_CompanyDetail.k36: Company time tracking is part of the company premium features. On the free plan the section stays visible but locked.

pages_ProjectDetail.k13: Milestones are available on sponsored worksites. On a free worksite this section stays visible but locked.
pages_ProjectDetail.k14: Premium areas are now hidden and the worksite cannot be used as a normal free worksite. From here you can only manage participants and invite companies that can restore a valid sponsorship.
pages_ProjectDetail.k15: Budget, costs, progress statements and financial settings unlock only when the worksite is sponsored by a paid company.
